Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER to be performed after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include a rejection loop
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after the case reaches Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that later result in a successful Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER and the subsequent Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER to the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER is performed in variants involving pre-approval steps
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that do not involve Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER measured from the moment the case enters the approval phase by the budget owner
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by BUDGET_OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'
